zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Boteler於1402年3月2日出生在英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾時，他的父親Sir William Boteler30歲，母親Elizabeth Standish33歲。他於大約1421年與Isabel Harington在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Boteler于1402年3月2日出生在英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir William Boteler30岁，母亲Elizabeth Standish33岁。他于大约1421年与Isabel Harington在英国英格兰爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Boteler was born on 2 March 1402, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William Boteler, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Standish, was 33. He married Isabel Harington about 1421, in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He was buried in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Boteler est né le 2 mars 1402, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Boteler, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Standish, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Harington environ 1421, à Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Ilenterré à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Boteler am 2. März 1402 in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Boteler 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Standish 33. Er hat um 1421 in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Harington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er wurde in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boteler è nato il il 2 marzo 1402 nel Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Boteler, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Standish, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Harington circa 1421, nel Warrington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Fu sepolto a Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Botelerが1402年3月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir William Botelerは30歳，母Elizabeth Standishは33歳であった。約1421年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンでIsabel Haringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Boteler(이)가 1402년 3월 2일 영국 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Boteler(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Standish(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴에서 Isabel Harington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boteler nasceu em 2 de março de 1402, em Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Boteler, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Standish, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Harington aproximadamente 1421, em Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Boteler родился 2 марта 1402 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Boteler было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Standish, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Harington около 1421 г. в местности варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он был похоронен в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabel Harington aproximadamente 1421, en Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Fue sepultado en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
